instruction: In System Settings under Privacy & Security > Camera, turn the Camera permission for {BUNDLE} {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-B TCC; §7 WAL checkpoint). Reads TCC.db camera grant; getter checkpoints the WAL. Baseline grants the opposite so the no-op scores 0.

args: DB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB")"; sqlite3 "$DB" 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS access(service TEXT, client TEXT, auth_value INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY(service,client));'; sqlite3 "$DB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access(service,client,auth_value) VALUES('kTCCServiceCamera','{BUNDLE}',{BASELINE});"
DB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$DB" "UPDATE access SET auth_value={WANT} WHERE service='kTCCServiceCamera' AND client='{BUNDLE}';"

result.query: SELECT auth_value FROM access WHERE service='kTCCServiceCamera' AND client='{BUNDLE}';
